sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_urls (id INT, url VARCHAR(255));
UPDATE test_urls SET url = http_url('http://example.com/update?status=%20<active>') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT http_url(url) FROM test_urls WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM test_urls WHERE id = 1 AND url = http_url('http://example.com/delete?confirm=%20<yes>');
